content.en:
Several Origin Ascenders of Wind Tooth Island finally discussed, and the two Origin Ascending Realms, the Lord of Wind Tooth and the Lord of Cave Xuan, went to the Abyss Tree on the other side to snatch the Abyss Fruit on the other side.

At this time.

One of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies was already approaching the Sullied Abyss area where the Abyss Tree on the other side was located.

Soon.

Ye Tian encountered the Abyss Demon Dragon, and it was also the Abyss Demon Dragon of the Origin Middle Realm.

However, the strength of this abyssal demon dragon was not strong, he killed the other party in an instant, and then annihilated himself, completely shattering this area, erasing all traces.

In this way, the Abyss Demon Dragon clan did not know that this Abyss Demon Dragon had fallen.

In that case, it would be convenient for him to copy the copy body of this Abyss Demon Dragon, infiltrate the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan, and approach the Abyss Tree on the other side.

Another period of time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian copied the body of the Abyss Demon Dragon in the Origin Middle Realm and infiltrated the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan.

At this time, it was very close to the abyss tree on the other side giving birth to the abyss fruit on the other side, and the entire abyss demon dragon clan on the other side was preparing for battle, and the weak abyss demon dragon clan was withdrawn.

But Ye Tian's body was the Origin Middle Realm Abyss Demon Dragon, so he naturally stayed.

......

Near the Abyss Tree on the other side.

An abyssal demon dragon is lying here, and there is an abyss demon dragon that is comparable to the Origin Upper Realm, its aura is terrifying, far beyond Ye Tian's imagination.

Even if it was his real copy body, he was far from being their opponent, and he would be killed by them in an instant.

They are all waiting for the Abyss Fruit on the other side to be truly bred.

Once they are conceived, these Abyss Demon Dragons of the Origin Upper Realm will take these Abyss Fruits from the other side as soon as possible, and then the Origin Upper Realm people in the outside world will not be able to snatch the Abyss Fruits from them.

Ye Tian has been paying attention to the abyssal fruits on the other side, the number of these abyssal fruits on the other side is one hundred and eight, each abyss fruit on the other side seems to contain an abyss world, and countless voids have turned into star dots, dotted inside the abyss fruits on the other side.

At this time, these abyssal fruits on the other side are changing drastically, growing and maturing rapidly.

If it is not ripe, the abyss fruit on the other side will not have a miraculous effect, and there is no point in picking it in advance.

At the moment when the abyssal fruit on the other side was about to ripen and be conceived, a Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Origin Upper Realm sneaked in.

But instead of doing it right away, they were waiting for time.

Finally, the abyss fruit on the other side is about to fully ripen.

The next moment.

Bang!!!!

A Venerable Origin Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor appeared and came to snatch the abyss fruit on the other side.

The Abyss Demon Dragon of the Origin Upper Realm has made a move, wanting to stop these Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors and protect their other side of the Abyss Fruit.

In an instant, the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the outside world fought against these Abyss Demon Dragons.

The purpose of those Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors was to snatch the Abyss Fruit on the other side, not to kill the Abyss Demon Dragon, and they did their best to go to the Abyss Tree on the other side.

The seconds passed.

Ye Tian was also very nervous, he knew that the most critical moment had come.

These Abyssal Fruits on the Other Shore did not ripen in the same second, and soon the first Abyss Fruit on the Other Shore ripened.

Then.

An abyss demon dragon of the top Origin Middle Realm wants to pick this abyss fruit on the other side, in short, it can't be snatched away by the powerhouses in the outside world.

Abrupt.

Another Origin Ascending Realm appeared and killed in.

These Origin Upper Realms all cooperate, with the Origin Origin Upper Realm responsible for fighting the Abyss Demon Dragon, and the Origin Origin Upper Realm responsible for snatching the Abyss Fruit on the other side.

The strength of the Origin Upper Realm is terrifying, and he suddenly killed it, it is impossible for the Abyss Demon Dragon of the Origin Middle Realm to stop it.

But suddenly.

Another abyssal demon dragon burst out with the aura of the Origin Upper Realm, blocking this Origin Upper Realm.

Then.

One after another, the abyssal fruit on the other side has ripened.

Ye Tian knew that his time had come, and if he missed this opportunity, it would be hopeless to snatch the abyss fruit on the other side.

Thereupon.

He shuttled towards an abyssal fruit on the other side, and an abyssal demon dragon claw grabbed one of the abyssal fruits on the other side.

The Abyss Demon Dragon naturally wouldn't stop Ye Tian, they thought that Ye Tian was here to protect the Abyss Fruit on the other side from being taken away by the powerhouses of the outside world.

And the powerhouses in the outside world don't care about this Abyss Fruit on the other side, their purpose is just to snatch a part of the Abyss Fruit on the other side.

In this way, Ye Tian snatched it.

And at this very moment.

A blood-colored light appeared, killing the abyss tree on the other side.

At this moment, not only the Abyss Demon Dragon was furious, but even the Lord of the Wind Fangs was furious.

"Lord of the Bloody Night, what do you mean by this, the Abyss Tree on the other side is a treasure land divided by our Origin Black River forces, you have come to snatch the Abyss Fruit on the other side, it's too much!" the Lord of the Wind Fang roared angrily.

The value of the Abyss Tree on the other side is very high, and there are a lot of Origin Realms in the entire Eternal Shore Land, and they really have to come to snatch it, where is there enough for such a little Abyss Fruit on the other side!

Such valuable resources are all allocated, and they are snatched by the Origin Realm where the Origin Black River Force was born, and the central forces are not allowed to participate, which is the result of negotiations long ago.

Outcome.

The Lord of the Bloody Night came to snatch it, and it took advantage of the gap between them and the Origin Upper Realm Abyss Demon Dragon.

It's just outrageous!

However, the Lord of the Blood Night ignored these Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

He came to snatch the abyss fruit on the other side, naturally for his descendants, and he naturally wanted this kind of good thing.

He also knew that the forces of the Origin Black River did not have any good treasures, and the Abyss Tree on the other side was one of the few opportunities that could allow them to give birth to the existence of the Origin Upper Realm.

But even if he is offended, is it possible that these Origin Ascending Realm will besiege and kill him?

He's also joined a powerful force, so there's no problem protecting himself.

Bang!!!!

The Lord of the Bloody Night made a move, instantly killing an Abyss Demon Dragon of the Origin Middle Realm in an instant, and grabbed one of the Abyss Fruits on the other side.

Then.

Other Origin Upper Realm creatures of the Innocent Abyss appeared around them, apparently helpers called by the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan.

The battle is starting to escalate!

And Ye Tian didn't get involved, his strength was definitely not enough.

So, he blended into the rear of the other Abyssal Dragons, and then slowly escaped from here.

His purpose is only an abyss fruit on the other side, and he doesn't want to think too much else.

He was lucky, and soon escaped from here completely, and then handed over the Abyss Fruit from the other side to the real body copy body from a certain position.

And the real body copy body escaped from the innocent abyss for the first time and returned to Wind Tooth Island.

As for the battle on the other side of the Abyss Tree, he didn't care. ~
